title: Periodate as an Analytical Reagent. Part IX. Determination of Sulphur Compounds Through Iodate Formed in the Reaction.
author: R. L. KAUSIDK
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Regional Engineering College, Kurukshetra (Haryana). 

  Manuscript received 9 April 1976 ; accepted 15 July 1976  

 Sulphide, bydrosulphide, suiphite, bisulphite, thiosulphate, trithionate and tetra­thionate have been oxidised by metaperiodate under suitable conditions and determined by titrating the iodate formed in the reaction iodometrically after masking of the excess metaperiodate with molybdate
steps_raw:
